# Linkkk

> Linkkk is a smart, open-source link management platform. Create short URLs, define conditional redirect rules, track analytics, and generate QR codes — all without writing code.

## What Linkkk does

Linkkk goes beyond simple URL shortening. Every link can have rules: redirect mobile users differently, block bots, require a password, schedule expiration, trigger webhooks, or serve different destinations based on country. The rules engine is visual and requires no coding knowledge.

## Key features

- **Smart rules**: Condition-based redirects by country, device, VPN detection, bot filtering, time schedule, and more.
- **Analytics**: Click tracking with device, browser, country, and referrer breakdowns.
- **QR codes**: Auto-generated, downloadable QR codes for every link.
- **Password protection**: Lock links behind a password.
- **Webhooks**: Trigger external integrations on every click.
- **Self-hostable**: Fully open source under MIT license.

## Plans

- **Free**: Up to 10 links with rules, analytics, and QR codes. No credit card required.
- **Pro**: Unlimited links, advanced analytics, priority support.

## Docs

- Getting started: https://linkkk.dev/docs/getting-started
- Links guide: https://linkkk.dev/docs/links
- Rules guide: https://linkkk.dev/docs/rules
- Analytics: https://linkkk.dev/docs/analytics
- QR codes: https://linkkk.dev/docs/qr
- Plans: https://linkkk.dev/docs/plans
- Security: https://linkkk.dev/docs/security
